languages.original_text: "A disagreement arose with the cloister's arch-chemist, Tecla-Paradigm-13. She stubbornly refused to understand the importance of my research and would not authorise access to the sacrarium of alchemical reagents. Since her arguments were invalid and her theoretical basis flawed, I decided to disregard her prohibition and grant myself access."

languages.text: "У нас возникли разногласия с архихимиком обители, Тэклой-Парадигма-13. Она упрямо отказывалась понимать важность моих трудов и не санкционировала доступ к сакрариуму алхимических реагентов. Так как ее аргументы были невалидны, а теоретическая база ущербна, я решил пренебречь ее запретом и санкционировал себя самостоятельно".

languages.text: «Tuve un desacuerdo con la archiquímica del claustro, Tecla-Paradigma-13. Se negó con tozudez a comprender la importancia de mi investigación y no me permitió acceder al sagrario de catalizadores alquímicos. Ya que sus argumentos no eran válidos y su base teórica era errónea, decidí ignorar la prohibición y concederme acceso a mí mismo».
languages.original_text: "A disagreement arose with the cloister's arch-chemist, Tecla-Paradigm-13. She stubbornly refused to understand the importance of my research and would not authorise access to the sacrarium of alchemical reagents. Since her arguments were invalid and her theoretical basis flawed, I decided to disregard her prohibition and grant myself access."

traits.locale_text: «Tuve un desacuerdo con la archiquímica del claustro, Tecla-Paradigma-13. Se negó con tozudez a comprender la importancia de mi investigación y no me permitió acceder al sagrario de catalizadores alquímicos. Ya que sus argumentos no eran válidos y su base teórica era errónea, decidí ignorar la prohibición y concederme acceso a mí mismo».

languages.text: “我和修道院的首席炼金师泰克拉·帕拉戴姆-13产生了分歧。她固执地拒绝理解我研究的重要性，也不肯批准我进入炼金试剂圣库。既然她的论点站不住脚，理论基础也有问题，我决定无视她的禁令，自行进入。”
languages.original_text: "A disagreement arose with the cloister's arch-chemist, Tecla-Paradigm-13. She stubbornly refused to understand the importance of my research and would not authorise access to the sacrarium of alchemical reagents. Since her arguments were invalid and her theoretical basis flawed, I decided to disregard her prohibition and grant myself access."

traits.locale_text: “我和修道院的首席炼金师泰克拉·帕拉戴姆-13产生了分歧。她固执地拒绝理解我研究的重要性，也不肯批准我进入炼金试剂圣库。既然她的论点站不住脚，理论基础也有问题，我决定无视她的禁令，自行进入。”

languages.text: « Je me suis retrouvé en désaccord avec l'archi-chimiste du cloître, Tecla Paradigme-13. Elle refusait avec obstination de reconnaître l'importance de mes recherches et me refusait systématiquement l'accès au sacrarium de composants alchimiques. Puisque ses arguments n'étaient pas recevables et que sa théorie fondamentale présentait des failles, j'ai décidé d'ignorer son interdiction et de m'accorder moi-même cet accès. »
languages.original_text: "A disagreement arose with the cloister's arch-chemist, Tecla-Paradigm-13. She stubbornly refused to understand the importance of my research and would not authorise access to the sacrarium of alchemical reagents. Since her arguments were invalid and her theoretical basis flawed, I decided to disregard her prohibition and grant myself access."

traits.locale_text: « Je me suis retrouvé en désaccord avec l'archi-chimiste du cloître, Tecla Paradigme-13. Elle refusait avec obstination de reconnaître l'importance de mes recherches et me refusait systématiquement l'accès au sacrarium de composants alchimiques. Puisque ses arguments n'étaient pas recevables et que sa théorie fondamentale présentait des failles, j'ai décidé d'ignorer son interdiction et de m'accorder moi-même cet accès. »

languages.text: "Es gab einen Dissens mit der Erzchemikerin des Klosters, Tecla-Paradigma-13. Sie weigerte sich beharrlich, die Bedeutung meiner Forschung zu verstehen und verwehrte mir den Zugang zum Sakrarium alchemistischer Reagenzien. Da ihre Argumente unzulässig waren und ihre theoretische Basis zu wünschen übrig ließ, beschloss ich, ihr Verbot zu ignorieren und mir selbst Zugang zu gewähren."
languages.original_text: "A disagreement arose with the cloister's arch-chemist, Tecla-Paradigm-13. She stubbornly refused to understand the importance of my research and would not authorise access to the sacrarium of alchemical reagents. Since her arguments were invalid and her theoretical basis flawed, I decided to disregard her prohibition and grant myself access."

traits.locale_text: "Es gab einen Dissens mit der Erzchemikerin des Klosters, Tecla-Paradigma-13. Sie weigerte sich beharrlich, die Bedeutung meiner Forschung zu verstehen und verwehrte mir den Zugang zum Sakrarium alchemistischer Reagenzien. Da ihre Argumente unzulässig waren und ihre theoretische Basis zu wünschen übrig ließ, beschloss ich, ihr Verbot zu ignorieren und mir selbst Zugang zu gewähren."

languages.text: 「回廊のアーキ・ケミスト、テクラ＝パラダイム13と意見の相違が生じた。彼女は頑なに私の研究の重要性を理解しようとせず、錬金術試薬の保管庫への立ち入りを許可しなかった。彼女の主張は無効であり、理論的根拠にも欠陥があったため、私は彼女の禁止を無視し、私自身のアクセスを許可することにした。」
languages.original_text: "A disagreement arose with the cloister's arch-chemist, Tecla-Paradigm-13. She stubbornly refused to understand the importance of my research and would not authorise access to the sacrarium of alchemical reagents. Since her arguments were invalid and her theoretical basis flawed, I decided to disregard her prohibition and grant myself access."

traits.locale_text: 「回廊のアーキ・ケミスト、テクラ＝パラダイム13と意見の相違が生じた。彼女は頑なに私の研究の重要性を理解しようとせず、錬金術試薬の保管庫への立ち入りを許可しなかった。彼女の主張は無効であり、理論的根拠にも欠陥があったため、私は彼女の禁止を無視し、私自身のアクセスを許可することにした。」

languages.text: "Manastırın başkimyageri Tecla Paradigm-13 ile bir anlaşmazlık yaşadık. Araştırmamın önemini anlamayı inatla reddetti ve simya ayıraçlarının kutsal alanına erişime izin vermedi. Argümanları geçersiz, teorik temelleri de kusurlu olduğu için yasağını göz ardı etmeye ve kendi kendime erişim izni vermeye karar verdim."
languages.original_text: "A disagreement arose with the cloister's arch-chemist, Tecla-Paradigm-13. She stubbornly refused to understand the importance of my research and would not authorise access to the sacrarium of alchemical reagents. Since her arguments were invalid and her theoretical basis flawed, I decided to disregard her prohibition and grant myself access."
